lenders.name: Ledn
lenders.custody: Third-party custody (BitGo, others). Standard (rehypothecated) or Custodied (segregated).
lenders.repayment: Balloon at maturity. No monthly payments. Repay anytime in USD, USDC, or local currency. Interest accrues daily but only owed when loan closes. No early-repayment penalty.
lenders.notes: Longest-running BTC lender. $10B+ funded with no client losses. Tiered rates kick in automatically at $250K, $1M, and $2M.

lenders.name: Strike
lenders.custody: Custodial. BTC-only collateral. Held by Strike or transferred to vetted third-party capital providers (no further rehypothecation).
lenders.term: 12 months. Available globally as of July 2025.
lenders.rollover: Yes — multiple loans (up to 3) and refinance supported
lenders.repayment: Two options: (1) Payment at Maturity — principal + interest in single balloon payment, or (2) Monthly Payments — interest paid monthly, principal at maturity. No origination fee, no early repayment fee, no liquidation fee. Daily interest accrual. Loans payable in USD or USDC. EUR/GBP supported in many countries.
lenders.notes: Aggressive tier discounts at $250K, $1M, and $5M. US rates start 1% lower than global. Lending Proof-of-Reserves launched 2026. Volatility-proof loan structure (no forced liquidation on price drops) being rolled out.

lenders.name: Arch Lending
lenders.custody: Anchorage Digital (federally chartered). Multi-collateral support: BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP.
lenders.repayment: Two options: (1) Monthly Payment (interest paid monthly, principal balloon at maturity) at the published rate, or (2) Deferred Interest (no monthly payments, all interest accrues to maturity) at ~0.5% higher APR. Payments in USD or USDC. No early repayment penalty. 2.5% liquidation fee if collateral has to be sold.
lenders.notes: NMLS #2637200, licensed in 39 US states (excluded: CA, DE, HI, MS, MT, NV, ND, RI, SC, TX, VT). Tiered origination fee drops to 0% at $5M+. Multi-collateral support is unique among regulated US lenders.

lenders.name: Figure
lenders.repayment: Interest-only payments during loan, principal due at maturity. Repayment in USD via bank account. No prepayment penalty. Liquidation buffer between 75% and 80% LTV.
lenders.notes: Rate quoted at 50% LTV (8.91% / 9.999% APR with 1% origination fee). Figure prices by LTV, not by loan size — rates rise to ~11.50% at 75% LTV. Up to 75% LTV is the most aggressive available but carries high liquidation risk. Rehypothecates collateral, which subsidizes the rate but increases counterparty risk.

lenders.name: Milo
lenders.repayment: Standard: monthly interest payments, principal balloon at maturity. Deferred option: no monthly payments — interest accrues and is paid in full at maturity along with principal. Higher-touch service for larger loans.
lenders.notes: BTC and ETH collateral. Loans from $5K up to $5M. Starting rate 8.75% (10.75% APR with 2% origination fee). Margin call at 67% LTV. Custody at Coinbase/BitGo with no rehypothecation. Deferred-payment option is rare and useful if you need to avoid monthly outflow.

lenders.name: Unchained
lenders.custody: Collaborative multisig — keys split between you, Unchained, and a third party. No rehypothecation.
lenders.repayment: Quarterly interest payments via wire transfer in USD. Principal repaid as balloon at end of term. Refinance available. No early repayment fee, but loan is fixed-term so prepayment doesn't reduce interest already accrued.
lenders.notes: BUSINESS LOANS ONLY since 2024 (consumer loans paused). $150K minimum. 12% interest + 2% origination = 14.18% APR (12-month commercial term per Unchained's own pricing page). Origination fee is rolled into the borrowed amount. Best-in-class custody — your keys, your bitcoin, even during the loan.

lenders.name: Firefish
lenders.custody: Non-custodial multisig escrow. P2P marketplace — investors fund loans directly. MiCA-regulated.
lenders.repayment: Interest paid monthly or at maturity (varies by individual loan terms negotiated with the lender on the marketplace). Principal returned as bitcoin to your wallet automatically when loan is repaid in fiat. Repayment accepted in EUR, CHF, CZK, PLN, or USDC.
lenders.notes: Best European option. P2P marketplace means rates vary by individual deal — typical range 8–12%. Self-custody-aligned with multisig escrow. MiCA-registered.

lenders.name: Debifi
lenders.custody: Multisig collaborative custody (2-of-3) between borrower, lender, and Debifi as agent. MiCA-registered.
lenders.repayment: Interest paid at maturity (most common) or monthly depending on individual loan terms. Principal repaid in fiat (EUR, USD) or stablecoin. Bitcoin collateral released automatically via multisig once repayment confirmed. Early repayment generally accepted without penalty.
lenders.notes: Institutional-grade multisig. P2P marketplace connecting borrowers with vetted lenders — rates vary 9–13% depending on loan. Origination fee is tiered by loan size: 1.5% up to $300K, 1.2% to $1M, 1.0% above (plus a fixed 0.0001 BTC transaction fee, and an additional 0.3%/yr after the first year on multi-year loans). Strong custody model — no single party can move funds unilaterally.

lenders.name: Xapo Bank
lenders.custody: Held in segregated BTC Vault — never lent out, never rehypothecated. Licensed and regulated in Gibraltar as a private bank.
lenders.rollover: Yes — loan can be extended once if LTV is healthy (≤45%)
lenders.repayment: Variable interest rate that tracks Federal Reserve rates and updates daily. No fixed payment schedule — pay anytime during the term. Accrued interest is paid first, then principal. Repayable in USD. No early-repayment penalty. Liquidation triggers at 80% LTV; margin call at 65%.
lenders.notes: Requires $1,000/year Xapo Bank membership (includes other banking services). Variable rate is unusual in BTC lending — pricing depends on Fed rates. Strong custody model with no rehypothecation. Maximum 1 active loan at a time. $1M max per loan, $5M with custom approval.
